title: Joao Gomes Transfer to Aston Villa Trending in GB
description: Joao Gomes is trending in Great Britain following reports of his transfer from Wolves to Aston Villa, according to multiple news sources.

sources.title: João Gomes bolsters Aston Villa midfield as switch from Wolves confirmed
Aston Villa sign Joao Gomes in £38m deal from Wolves
Aston Villa confirm £35m signing of Joao Gomes from Wolves

sections.heading: Transfer Confirmation
paragraphs: According to ESPN, João Gomes bolsters the Aston Villa midfield as a switch from Wolves was confirmed. BBC reports that Aston Villa has signed Joao Gomes in a £38m deal from Wolves. Additionally, The New York Times states that Aston Villa has confirmed the £35m signing of Joao Gomes from Wolves.

sections.heading: Financial Details
paragraphs: There are varying reports regarding the financial specifics of the transfer. BBC cites the deal as being worth £38m. In contrast, The New York Times reports the signing fee as £35m.

sections.heading: Search Interest
paragraphs: The keyword 'joao gomes' is currently trending in the GB region. Google Trends reported a search lower bound of 1000 for this term. The trend feed was published on July 20, 2026, and the snapshot was taken on July 20, 2026.

faq.q: Which clubs are involved in the Joao Gomes transfer?
faq.a: According to ESPN, BBC, and The New York Times, Joao Gomes has moved from Wolves to Aston Villa.

faq.q: What is the reported transfer fee for Joao Gomes?
faq.a: BBC reports a £38m deal, while The New York Times reports a £35m signing fee.
